name: @solez-ai/vell
description: Official JavaScript and WebAssembly API for the Vell document language
author: Samin Yeasar

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build:wasm && npm run build && npm run typecheck

//deno: Deno can import this package via `npm:@solez-ai/vell`. WASM loading uses `Deno.readFile()` via initWasm().
